notes: Saved boundary spectrum must equal the imposed POWER_LAW spectrum.
J_local(E) must equal T(E)*J_boundary(E) at every saved energy node.
Transmission must remain in the physical interval [0
Density file must equal 4*pi*int J_local(E)/v(E)dE reconstructed from the saved spectrum.
Total flux file must equal 4*pi*int J_local(E)dE reconstructed from the saved spectrum.
Each requested energy-channel flux must equal the same integral over the saved spectrum.
